IHU Signed a MoU with the Turkish Justice Academy

05.10.2022

Muhittin Özdemir,  visited our University.

Muhittin Özdemir, President of the Turkish Justice Academy, visited our University. Muhittin Özdemir hosted by our President Prof. Atilla Arkan on Tuesday, October 4th.

During the meeting, two protocols were signed between Ibn Haldun University, Arbitration Academy, and the Turkish Justice Academy, in order to strengthen relations and take cooperation to the next level.

Within the scope of the visit, Muhittin Özdemir participated as a speaker at the event titled "Professional Law Talks: Judgeship and Prosecutor's Office" organized by the Faculty of Law.
